title: Full-stack Next.js App with MongoDB
description: Build a complete Next.js application using MongoDB Atlas for flexible NoSQL storage, Auth.js with the MongoDB adapter for authentication, and Vercel for deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Connect to MongoDB Atlas with Mongoose ODM — define models, indexes, and connection singleton
Add authentication with Auth.js using the MongoDB adapter for database-backed sessions
Add schema validation for API route inputs and form data
Set up unit testing for models and API logic
Configure CI/CD pipeline with type-check and test jobs
Deploy to Vercel — set MONGODB_URI and AUTH_SECRET as environment variables
